ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., general, primary, runoff) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office being elected */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the election is held */,
  "election_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the election */,
  "election_turnout" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage for the election */,
  "election_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_slug" TEXT /* Slug for the state */,
  "state_abbrev" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "state_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "office_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the office */,
  "office_level" TEXT /* Level of the office (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "county_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party of the candidate */,
  "candidate_party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "candidate_biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "party_ideology" TEXT /* Ideology of the party (e.g., conservative, liberal, moderate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes received by the candidate */,
  "leader_margin_value" REAL /* Margin by which the leader is winning */,
  "leader_margin_name" TEXT /* Name of the leader */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., certified, unofficial, pending) */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_results" (
  "county_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county result */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate in the county */,
  "absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes received by the candidate in the county */,
  "county_result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., certified, unofficial, pending) */,
  "county_result_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_results_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the precinct is located */,
  "precinct_population" INTEGER /* Population of the precinct */,
  "precinct_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polling_places" (
  "polling_place_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polling place */,
  "polling_place_name" TEXT /* Name of the polling place */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the polling place is located */,
  "polling_place_address" TEXT /* Address of the polling place */,
  "polling_place_hours" TEXT /* Hours of operation for the polling place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("polling_place_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_places_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polling_place_results" (
  "polling_place_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polling place result */,
  "polling_place_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the polling place */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate at the polling place */,
  "absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes received by the candidate at the polling place */,
  "polling_place_result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., certified, unofficial, pending) */,
  "polling_place_result_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("polling_place_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_place_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_place_results_polling_place_id FOREIGN KEY ("polling_place_id") REFERENCES polling_places ("polling_place_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_place_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "user_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the election data */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the election data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the data */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user when accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "data_source_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data source */,
  "data_source_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)
